name: Butterscotch Squares
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Helen Jolly
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease a 9x15-inch jelly-roll pan. In a large bowl, combine melted margarine and brown sugar. Mix well. Beat in eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition until smooth. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together into a separate bowl. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture; beat thoroughly. Stir in nuts and chocolate chips until evenly distributed. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow the bars to cool in the pan for about 20 minutes before cutting into squares. Makes 4 dozen.
